global.title: Interview: we meet with Port of Long Beach CEO Dr. Noel Hacegaba
global.summary: On today’s authoritative episode of Quick Charge, we’re talking all about how ports and port authorities are cleaning up their acts with the man in charge of the busiest port in North America – Port of Long Beach CEO Dr. Noel Hacegaba.

global.title: Volkswagen’s new electric hot hatch breaks cover, but it’s not the ID. Polo GTI
global.summary: The ID. Polo GTI will go on sale this fall as Volkswagen’s first electric GTI, but another EV hot hatch was just caught testing, and we expect to see it in full by the end of the year.

global.title: Lucid Gravity GT 2026 Review: drives like a dream with best efficiency and massive range
global.summary: I drove the Lucid Gravity GT for more than 547 miles (881 km) across a mix of highway, backroads, and city driving, and I enjoyed nearly everything this vehicle has to offer. global.title: Hyundai has a few tricks up its sleeve for its next ‘N’ EVs

global.title: Ferrari replaces marketing chief after Luce EV launch backlash
global.summary: Ferrari has replaced its long-serving chief marketing and commercial officer, Enrico Galliera, just weeks after the rocky debut of the Luce, the automaker’s first electric car.
